subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Ancient Beauty! The glance of divine favor encompasseth thee, and perfect wisdom is complete in all that transpireth in the realm of being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال قدم نظر عنایت شامل است و حکمت بالغه کامل آنچه در عالم امکان واقع
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort
